## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Tribe AI and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and AI thought leadership initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/FQxh6GNMdKgtXEE-C32DWqEjsoZ6CdNk?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on creating concise, impactful content highlighting Tribe AI's unique insights on AI adoption and implementation](https://fathom.video/share/FQxh6GNMdKgtXEE-C32DWqEjsoZ6CdNk?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)
  - [Develop a process to efficiently turn Jaclyn's talks/presentations into multiple content pieces](https://fathom.video/share/FQxh6GNMdKgtXEE-C32DWqEjsoZ6CdNk?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [Identify and incorporate real-world AI case studies and success stories into content](https://fathom.video/share/FQxh6GNMdKgtXEE-C32DWqEjsoZ6CdNk?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Shift strategy from SEO-driven to expert-driven approach, prioritizing quality over quantity](https://fathom.video/share/FQxh6GNMdKgtXEE-C32DWqEjsoZ6CdNk?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Refinement

  - [Current content draft is too long and unfocused; needs to be more concise and impactful](https://fathom.video/share/FQxh6GNMdKgtXEE-C32DWqEjsoZ6CdNk?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
  - [Structure should follow: acknowledge current state (trough of disillusionment), signals of change, path forward](https://fathom.video/share/FQxh6GNMdKgtXEE-C32DWqEjsoZ6CdNk?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Focus on how companies can get value from AI rather than dwelling on challenges](https://fathom.video/share/FQxh6GNMdKgtXEE-C32DWqEjsoZ6CdNk?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [Incorporate real-world case studies and success stories (e.g., Klarna's efficiency gains)](https://fathom.video/share/FQxh6GNMdKgtXEE-C32DWqEjsoZ6CdNk?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Aim for 90% content quality through iterative process with Jaclyn's input](https://fathom.video/share/FQxh6GNMdKgtXEE-C32DWqEjsoZ6CdNk?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### Case Study Development

  - [Jimmy presented enterprise AI project case studies idea](https://fathom.video/share/FQxh6GNMdKgtXEE-C32DWqEjsoZ6CdNk?tab=summary&timestamp=1094.0)
  - [Focus on positive outcomes and tangible results, avoid overwhelming readers with implementation challenges](https://fathom.video/share/FQxh6GNMdKgtXEE-C32DWqEjsoZ6CdNk?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)
  - [Team to compile 3-4 case studies for next week's discussion](https://fathom.video/share/FQxh6GNMdKgtXEE-C32DWqEjsoZ6CdNk?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)
  - [Consider reaching out to featured companies for interviews and primary content](https://fathom.video/share/FQxh6GNMdKgtXEE-C32DWqEjsoZ6CdNk?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [Jaclyn to provide PDF of recent presentation and audio notes on key talking points](https://fathom.video/share/FQxh6GNMdKgtXEE-C32DWqEjsoZ6CdNk?tab=summary&timestamp=894.0)
  - [Team to extract multiple content angles and modular components from single input](https://fathom.video/share/FQxh6GNMdKgtXEE-C32DWqEjsoZ6CdNk?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
  - [Develop process for Jaclyn to provide quick voice notes to refine content](https://fathom.video/share/FQxh6GNMdKgtXEE-C32DWqEjsoZ6CdNk?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
  - [Balance between thought leadership and SEO-driven content, focusing on Tribe AI's unique perspective](https://fathom.video/share/FQxh6GNMdKgtXEE-C32DWqEjsoZ6CdNk?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)

### SEO and Topic Selection

  - Tribe AI ranking \#1 for "AI in construction" - opportunity to replicate for other industries
  - [Refine topic selection to align with Tribe AI's expertise and perspective](https://fathom.video/share/FQxh6GNMdKgtXEE-C32DWqEjsoZ6CdNk?tab=summary&timestamp=1759.0)
  - [Focus on fewer, high-quality pieces rather than broad coverage of all AI topics](https://fathom.video/share/FQxh6GNMdKgtXEE-C32DWqEjsoZ6CdNk?tab=summary&timestamp=1812.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jaclyn to send presentation PDF and audio notes with key talking points](https://fathom.video/share/FQxh6GNMdKgtXEE-C32DWqEjsoZ6CdNk?tab=summary&timestamp=2028.0)
  - [Team to develop 3-4 case studies and compile research on AI success stories](https://fathom.video/share/FQxh6GNMdKgtXEE-C32DWqEjsoZ6CdNk?tab=summary&timestamp=1960.0)
  - [Refine content creation process to efficiently turn Jaclyn's insights into multiple pieces](https://fathom.video/share/FQxh6GNMdKgtXEE-C32DWqEjsoZ6CdNk?tab=summary&timestamp=1985.0)
  - [Focus on 1 thought leadership piece and 3-5 research-based guides for the next month](https://fathom.video/share/FQxh6GNMdKgtXEE-C32DWqEjsoZ6CdNk?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Continue improving existing content to maintain and expand SEO rankings in various industries](https://fathom.video/share/FQxh6GNMdKgtXEE-C32DWqEjsoZ6CdNk?tab=summary&timestamp=1997.0)
